ALL_METERREADING_TEXT: If selected, system will send SMS to customer on meter reading
SMART_TEXT: SMS for Smart Meter Readings Only
BILLING_SMS_TEXT: If selected, system will send SMS to customer on billing
SHOW_LOGO_TEXT: If selected yes, logo image is printed in report else logo will be removed from report
DEACTIVATE_HOLIDAYS_TEXT: If selected, gone holidays will be deactivated every day at midnight
PRINT_DOUBLE_RECEIPT_TEXT: If selected yes, double receipt is printed else single receipt is printed
EXCLUDE_SEPARATOR_TEXT: If selected separator line will be removed from print page else separator line is printed
INCLUDE_PAN_TEXT: If selected, pan number will be included on Receipt print
SHOW_SUMMARY_TEXT: If selected yes statement will be shown in summary in billing page
FISCAL_YEAR_READINGS_TEXT: If selected meter reading will be filtered according to current fiscal year
PRINT_SUMMARY_TEXT: If selected yes, bill summary will be printed
PRINT_HEADER_TEXT: If selected yes, organization's header will be printed on bill
DISCOUNT_PENALTY_WASHBILLING_TEXT: If selected yes, first discount/penalty information is displayed in WashBilling
SCHEME_DISCOUNT_WASHBILLING_TEXT: If selected yes, scheme discount/penalty information is displayed in WashBilling
ROUND_OFF_TEXT: If selected yes, customer's bill statement will be rounded off in total
CALCULATE_PENALTY_ADVANCE_TEXT: If selected yes, customer's bill penalties will be calculated on the basis of their advance amount available
PENALTY_DISCOUNT_TEXT: If selected yes, all discount amount will be sent to zero(0) if any penalty is found
ADDRESS_GENERATION_TEXT: If selected yes, address will be generated from Marga and tole
